name: YNX DEX

minOS.web: modern browser with ES2022 and PWA support

recoveredCandidate.scope: constant-product contracts, indexer, JavaScript SDK, and Web/PWA preview

strategyVault.scope: immutable owner/engine vault, typed swap and liquidity methods, mandate limits, oracle/depeg checks, pause/revoke/kill, emergency exit, no fee charging

executionAdapter.scope: typed Vault requests, exact Wallet approval digest, injected engine transport, direct/indexed reconciliation, fail-closed gas/fee/oracle/risk snapshots, explicit CPMM collect capability, bounded compound and stepwise rebalance

vaultIndexer.scope: confirmed ActionExecuted ingestion, Vault-bound cursor v2, state migration, shared reorg recovery, source-labelled API

knownLimitations: The final DEX objective is not implemented or fully tested locally; recovered 0.1 candidate coverage is recorded separately.
No YNX Testnet protocol deployment, verified bytecode, pools, swaps, or LP proofs exist yet.
Canonical Wallet verifier and DEX registry entry are not integrated into main.
No independent third-party smart-contract audit has been completed.
CPMM LP fees are embedded in reserves; there is no separate LP collect method, and compound/rebalance require caller-supplied amounts plus sequential Wallet approvals.
Staging, public deployment, hosted download, production signing, and store release are absent.

The Web/PWA prepares deterministic swap and LP reviews, but all transaction authorization remains unavailable until canonical Wallet registry integration and verified Testnet contract addresses exist.
